task description instructions and export_result.sh which parses this CSV file.
Calculated based on the task description requiring a precise 100x100 pixel spatial subset, which translates to 10,000 pixels. SNAP CSV export generates one data row per pixel.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a 100x100 pixel spatial subset of a real Landsat multispectral image from the OpenGeos dataset. The resulting DIMAP subset is expected at /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_subset.dim and the final exported CSV at /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_dataset.csv. Based on the 100x100 resolution requirement, the exported CSV dataset will contain exactly 10,000 rows of pixel data.
